industry_and_segment: Business/Productivity Software, Sales Enablement Software, Information Technology and Services, Internet
key_positioning: AI-powered revenue enablement platform designed to ramp reps faster, engage the modern buyer, and close more deals.
revenue_model: Subscription-based model, Software as a Service (SaaS), Data as a Service (DaaS).
milestones: Strengthened security with completion of ISO certifications
Named "AI-based Sales Solution of the Year" in 2025 Artificial Intelligence Breakthrough Awards Program
new_features_launched: ElevateOS™: The first agentic operating system for revenue enablement
other_crucial_details: The company's name "Mindtickle" comes from a desire to create an engaging, gamified platform with a unique approach to learning and rewarding comprehension.
Mindtickle operates on a subscription-based model, offering services such as sales training, onboarding, coaching, and performance analytics.
The platform integrates with over 100 tools, including Salesforce, Microsoft Teams, and Google products.
